channel.title: Zeitschrift für Naturforschung A
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Zeitschrift für Naturforschung A

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Roshni Srivastava, Ramanshu P. Singh, Giridhar Mishra DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zna-2024-frontmatter12

item.title: The generalized soliton wave structures and propagation visualization for Akbota equation
item.description: Article by Roshni Srivastava, Ramanshu P. Singh, Giridhar Mishra DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zna-2024-0120

item.title: Maxwell–Cattaneo double-diffusive convection of Kuvshiniski viscoelastic nanofluid in a Brinkman–Darcy porous medium
item.description: Article by Roshni Srivastava, Ramanshu P. Singh, Giridhar Mishra DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zna-2024-0145

item.title: Simple waves for anti-van der Waals modified Chaplygin gas in 2-D magnetohydrodynamics
item.description: Article by Roshni Srivastava, Ramanshu P. Singh, Giridhar Mishra DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zna-2024-0165

item.title: Choi representation of completely positive maps in brief
item.description: Article by Roshni Srivastava, Ramanshu P. Singh, Giridhar Mishra DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zna-2024-0144

item.title: Study of mechanical and thermophysical properties of Ni3Ti
item.description: Article by Roshni Srivastava, Ramanshu P. Singh, Giridhar Mishra DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/zna-2024-0093
